news.headline: Energy Transfer prices secondary public offering of 38,755,996 common units at $15.78 per unit, with proceeds going to Selling Unitholders.
news.summary: Dallas-based Energy Transfer LP has revealed the pricing details of a secondary public offering. The offering comprises 38,755,996 common units at a price of $15.78 per unit. The offering is underwritten by WTG Midstream LLC and a Stonepeak affiliate, who will receive all proceeds from the sale. Energy Transfer itself will not benefit from this transaction. The common units represent limited partner interests in the Partnership and are traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ET.

news.headline: Crave Hot Dogs & BBQ expands into New Philadelphia, Ohio's Walmart, after announcing expansion into Louisville, Kentucky.
news.summary: Crave Hot Dogs & BBQ has revealed its plans to expand into Walmart stores across the United States as of August 9, 2024. The initial Walmart location set to host a Crave outlet is in Louisville, Kentucky, with more locations to follow. Additionally, Crave is eager to introduce its offerings in New Philadelphia, Ohio, as part of this expansion initiative. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as it looks to grow its presence nationwide.

news.headline: Featherstone Foundation awards $80,000 college scholarships to 27 Baltimore students for higher education.
news.summary: Baltimore, August 9, 2024 - The William & Lanaea C. Featherstone Foundation, a renowned nonprofit dedicated to enhancing educational access, has revealed the awardees of the esteemed Featherstone College Scholarship Awards. A total of 27 exceptional individuals have been chosen to receive this honor, recognizing their achievements and potential in the academic realm.

news.headline: NVNI (Nasdaq) appoints José Mário Ribeiro Jr. as Board Adviser.
news.summary: According to the latest report, the unemployment rate has dropped to 5.2%, with a total of 8.4 million people currently unemployed. The economy also saw a growth of 4.3% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant increase, with the main index rising by 7% in the last month. Experts attribute these positive developments to increased consumer spending and government stimulus initiatives.Overall, the economic outlook appears to be promising, with signs of recovery and growth in various sectors.

news.headline: Stryve Foods, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNAX) will announce Q2 results on August 14, 2024 at 4:30pm EDT.
news.summary: Stryve Foods, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNAX) has revealed that the fiscal 2024 second quarter results will be disclosed on August 14, 2024, at 4:30pm EDT.

news.headline: Poland Mortgage Lending Report 2024-2026 shows declines in building starts (-9%), permits (-19%), completions (-8%) impacting residential construction industry.
news.summary: A recent report on "Mortgage Lending in Poland, 2024-2026" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The residential construction sector in Poland has faced challenges due to negative trends since 2022. In 2023, building starts decreased by 9% YoY, permits dropped by 19% YoY, and completions fell by 8% YoY. This decline in new real estate supply, along with a government-backed program to assist first-time homebuyers, contributed to stimulating demand in the market.

news.headline: Infant phototherapy device market to reach US$135.97 million by 2032, up from US$96.44 million in 2023, states report.
news.summary: Dublin--A market report on Infant Phototherapy Devices has been released, analyzing the market's growth by light source (Fluorescent Lamps, Light Emitting Diodes, Quartz Halogen Lamps, Gas Discharge Tubes), configuration (Mobile Device, Fixed Device), and end-user (Hospitals, Neonatal Clinics). The report forecasts the market size to reach approximately US$ 135.97 Million by 2032, showing significant growth from US$ 96.44 Million in 2023. The research has been made available by ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: EaseUS celebrates 20th anniversary with up to 70% discounts & $500 Amazon gift card. New York, Aug 9, 2024.
news.summary: To mark its 20th anniversary, EaseUS, a leading software company, is offering up to 70% discounts and a $500 Amazon gift card to its valued customers. This celebration includes exclusive deals available to everyone.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer to host 28th CRA & Fair Lending Colloquium with Shaun Donovan and James Ballentine as key speakers.
news.summary: Wolters Kluwer Compliance Solutions is organizing its 28th CRA & Fair Lending Colloquium in Championsgate, Florida from November 17 to 20. The event will feature Shaun Donovan, CEO and President of Enterprise Community Partners, as the honorary keynote speaker on November 18. Additionally, James C. Ballentine, a seasoned government relations consultant in banking and currently a senior advisor at Porterfield, Fettig & Sears LLC, will deliver the keynote address on November 19.

news.headline: Market rally not confirmed yet; Meta leads stocks near buy points. Nvidia chipmaker TSMC reports strong sales.
news.summary: The current market rally is still facing challenges, with Meta leading stocks close to reaching buy points. TSMC, a prominent chipmaker for Nvidia, has recently reported impressive sales figures. The latest data from Dow Jones Futures indicates that the market rally is yet to establish itself fully. The article highlights the need for certain criteria to be met for the rally to thrive, while also noting the strong sales performance of TSMC, the chipmaker for Nvidia.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures decline with Nvidia rebounding; Elf Beauty shares dive post-earnings.
news.summary: Stock futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average decreased on Friday, while Nvidia's stock showed signs of improvement. On the other hand, Elf Beauty saw a significant drop following their earnings report. This information came from live coverage and is featured on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Nikola Corp. sees record revenue in Q2 2024 at $31.3M, up 318% from Q1. 72 hydrogen fuel cell vehicles wholesaled, surpassing guidance by 80%.
news.summary: In the second quarter of 2024, the company achieved its highest revenue to date with total earnings reaching $31.3 million, marking an impressive 318% increase from the previous quarter. Additionally, the company successfully sold 72 hydrogen fuel cell electric vehicles during Q2, surpassing the upper end of expectations and demonstrating an 80% increase from Q1. Furthermore, the company diversified its income sources by initiating the sale of regulatory-related products.

news.headline: VIPC celebrates 10,000 new high-growth startups in VA, with Governor Youngkin. Virginia's innovation ecosystems drive growth.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on August 9, 2024, the Virginia Innovation Partnership Corporation (VIPC) commended the state for achieving a milestone of generating 10,000 fresh opportunities in its innovation and entrepreneurship sectors.

news.headline: Rain Carbon Inc. released its second sustainability report, highlighting their journey towards sustainability.
news.summary: Rain Carbon Inc., a prominent global manufacturer of carbon-based products and advanced materials, has released its second external sustainability report titled "Resourceful, Reliable, Responsible. – Our journey towards a..." The report outlines the company's commitment to sustainability and details its progress in various areas. This signifies a significant step for RAIN as they continue to prioritize environmental responsibility and transparency in their operations. With this publication, RAIN aims to provide stakeholders with valuable insights into its sustainability efforts.

news.headline: Effective Fed fund rate unchanged ay 5.33% on August 8th.

Scaramucci sees hope in Democrats' crypto meeting amid regulatory pressure. VP Harris aims to win back industry support. 20 participants met via Zoom. Key attendees from the Biden administration. Regulatory crackdown under Biden admin. VP Harris silent during the meeting.
news.summary: A virtual meeting hosted by Congressman Ro Khanna aimed at reconciling tensions between the Democratic Party and the cryptocurrency industry took place, focusing on bridging gaps in an election year. The call involved around twenty participants, including top Biden Administration officials like Wally Adeyemo and Lael Brainard, as well as Bruce Reed. The Democratic Party, with Kamala Harris as a potential 2024 nominee, seeks to regain crypto voters who have leaned towards Trump, known for supporting the industry. The industry has faced increased scrutiny under Biden. Kristine Lucius, a senior adviser to Harris, was present but didn't speak. Vice President Harris aims to regain support from the crypto community as GOP candidate Trump has openly embraced it.

news.headline: ASM Global's culinary division SAVOR competes in young chef, waiter, and mixologist competition; national winners announced.
news.summary: In NAPA, California, ASM Global’s culinary division SAVOR has revealed the American national champions in a global competition for young culinary and hospitality talent. The winners include Thomas Mendel, a chef from Hamel Winery; Jaclyn Bisantz, a waitress from Harbor House; and Marco Guillen, a mixologist from Four Seasons Napa. SAVOR specializes in providing upscale food experiences for renowned venues worldwide. The competition showcases emerging talent in the industry, highlighting excellence in culinary arts and service. This announcement signifies a significant achievement for the winners in the competitive culinary and hospitality sector, recognizing their skill and dedication.

news.headline: Docebo to participate in investor conferences in August & September; key event: Canaccord Genuity's 44th Annual Growth Conference - August 13.
news.summary: A prominent learning platform provider, Docebo Inc. (NASDAQ: DCBO; TSX:DCBO), known for its expertise in artificial intelligence and innovative solutions, revealed that its management team will participate in key investor and software industry events in August and September 2024. The upcoming conferences include Canaccord Genuity’s 44th Annual Growth Conference scheduled for August 13 in Boston, and the Oppenheimer 27th Annual Technology, Internet & Communications Conference. These events serve as crucial opportunities for Docebo to showcase its leadership and strategic vision to a wider audience.

news.headline: Innovaccer launches Government Health AI Data & Analytics Platform for public sector, focused on Medicaid & Public Health.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Innovaccer Inc., a prominent healthcare AI company and Certified Data Partner for NCQA, has introduced the Government Health AI Data and Analytics Platform (GHAAP). This platform, recognized for its excellence, is among the pioneering solutions designed for the public sector, prioritizing Medicaid and Public Health Modernization. GHAAP offers end-to-end integration, interoperability, analytics, and AI capabilities, catering specifically to government health initiatives.

news.headline: EasyKnock partners with Rehab Warriors to help veterans in housing. Supports training for U.S. military vets. Commitment to address skills gap in real estate. #EasyKnock #RehabWarriors
news.summary: A collaboration has been established between EasyKnock and Rehab Warriors, aiming to empower U.S. military veterans in the housing industry. EasyKnock, known for residential sale-leaseback programs, is dedicated to offering improved opportunities for veterans. This strategic partnership highlights the urgent need for skilled professionals in real estate. By joining forces with Rehab Warriors, EasyKnock aims to contribute to addressing this need and supporting veterans in the industry. This initiative is part of EasyKnock's broader commitment to providing better prospects for veterans.

news.headline: Audrey Steele, Josh Chasin, and Graeme Hutton have joined RMT Advisory Board, utilizing AI and data for ad sales.
news.summary: Audrey Steele, former EVP of Sales Insights & Strategy at FOX, Josh Chasin, ex-Chief Measurability Officer at VideoAmp, and Graeme Hutton, previous SVP Data & Analytics at UM, have all recently joined RMT, Inc. The company specializes in leveraging its proprietary AI-derived language model and vast big data resources to boost advertising sales effectiveness. RMT utilizes advanced analysis of subconscious motivations derived from individuals' consumed content, with the aim of enhancing advertising strategies.

news.headline: Silver Point Finance provided $862 million in financing for Sweet Oak's acquisition of Whole Earth Brand.
news.summary: Today, in Greenwich, Connecticut, Silver Point Finance, a subsidiary of Silver Point Capital, L.P., revealed its role as the Administrative Agent, Collateral Agent, Joint Lead Arranger, and Joint Bookrunner in a significant financial transaction. The deal involved a total of $862 million in Senior Secured financing.

news.headline: Alaska Airlines renews partnership with Air Space Intelligence, advancing AI innovation for fuel efficiency. (Characters: 85)
news.summary: Alaska Airlines is maintaining its legacy of innovation by utilizing artificial intelligence in flight operations, which has proven to be beneficial in enhancing fuel efficiency. The airline recently extended its partnership with Air Space, further solidifying their commitment to pioneering AI technology. This move underscores Alaska's dedication to improving air travel operations. The announcement was made in Seattle on August 9, 2024.

news.headline: CleanSpark reschedules Q3 2024 financial results webcast to August 9, 2024, 4:30 PM ET / 1:30 PM PT.
news.summary: CleanSpark Inc., a leading American Bitcoin mining company trading on Nasdaq under the symbol CLSK, has rescheduled the release of its fiscal third quarter 2024 financial results for today, August 9, 2024. The announcement will be made at 4:30 PM Eastern Time and 1:30 PM Pacific Time. Those interested can access the webcast for more details.

news.headline: First C-130J Super Hercules delivered to New Zealand; total of 5 to be operated by Royal NZ Air Force.
news.summary: In a significant development, the Royal New Zealand Air Force has taken delivery of the initial C-130J Super Hercules aircraft from Lockheed Martin, marking the commencement of a new phase in New Zealand's tactical airlift capacity. The Air Force is set to manage a fleet of five C-130Js, enhancing its military capabilities. This move represents a major milestone for New Zealand's defense system and signifies a substantial investment in modernized aerial assets. The delivery of these advanced aircraft underscores a strategic advancement in the country's defense capabilities, setting the stage for heightened operational effectiveness.

news.headline: Hepsiburada schedules General Assembly for financial year 2023 on Sep 12, 2024, at 11:00 Istanbul time.
news.summary: In Istanbul on August 9, 2024, D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading, known as Hepsiburada and listed as HEPS on NASDAQ, a prominent e-commerce platform in Turkey, is set to convene its Ordinary General Assembly Meeting for shareholders regarding the fiscal year 2023. The meeting is scheduled for Thursday, September 12, 2024, at 11:00 Istanbul time. The location for the assembly is at the Company’s headquarters situated at Kuştepe Mahallesi, Mecidiyeköy Yolu Caddesi, No:12 Trump Towers, Tower No:2 Şişli, İstanbul.

news.headline: The Galien Foundation names nominees for 2024 Prix Galien USA, including categories for biotechnology, pharmaceuticals, and rare diseases.
news.summary: The Galien Foundation, a leading global organization that recognizes pioneers in life sciences, revealed the nominees for the 2024 Prix Galien USA Awards. The nominations include categories such as "Best Biotechnology Product," "Best Pharmaceutical Product," and "Best Product for...". The announcement was made on August 9, 2024, and marks another year of celebrating innovation in the industry. Stay tuned to witness which products emerge victorious in these highly regarded categories.

news.headline: Abu Dhabi to buy minority share in Sotheby's auction house.
Global concussion market to hit $10 billion by 2032 due to rising traumatic brain injuries. Concussions disrupt brain function.
news.summary: In Palm Beach, Florida, on August 9, 2024, FN Media Group reported that a concussion is a mild traumatic brain injury that disrupts normal brain function temporarily. Concussions typically result from a blow or jolt to the head but can also occur from a hit to the body.

news.headline: Seattle's Smith Tower and Butler Garage acquired by local ownership including GT Capital, Freestone Capital Management, Evergreen Ventures in a landmark transaction, investing in downtown Seattle's future.
news.summary: Several Seattle-based investment firms such as GT Capital, Freestone Capital Management, and Evergreen Ventures, along with notable Seattle families, are collectively investing in the revitalization of downtown Seattle. This significant transaction, which took place on August 9, 2024, highlights the continued attractiveness of Seattle's historic district. The investment amount remains undisclosed, but this move is set to inject substantial funds into the future development of downtown Seattle.

news.headline: Converge renews Normal Course Issuer Bid on TSX, plans to repurchase up to 3,786,727 shares.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, Converge Technology Solutions Corp. (referred to as "Converge" or the "Company") publicly disclosed that the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) has given its approval for the Company's Notice of Intention to conduct a Normal Course Issuer Bid (NCIB). Converge's stock ticker symbols on various exchanges are TSX: CTS, FSE: 0ZB, and OTCQX: CTSDF. This news indicates that the Company is planning to repurchase a specified number of its common shares through the NCIB program, suggesting its confidence in its financial position and future prospects.

news.headline: BayCare Health System maintains strong credit ratings post-restructuring: AA with Fitch and AA2 with...
news.summary: In Clearwater, Florida on August 9, 2024, BayCare Health System announced that it upheld its strong credit ratings in recent reports from new rating agencies. This comes shortly after a corporate restructure five weeks prior. BayCare received an AA rating from Fitch and an AA2 rating from another agency. The organization's consistent high ratings reflect its financial stability and management efficiency post-restructuring.

news.headline: Royal Canadian Mint's 2023 Pure Silver Coin - Allegory of Peace wins Coin of the Year in Most Inspirational category.
news.summary: In Ottawa on August 9, 2024, the Royal Canadian Mint proudly announced that its 2023 Pure Silver Coin - Allegory of Peace has won the Coin of the Year Award in the Most Inspirational category. This award is a testament to the Mint's commitment to excellence in its coin production. The Mint's silver coin stood out among competitors on a global scale.

news.headline: Conagra Brands buys Sweetwood Smoke & Co, maker of FATTY Smoked Meat Sticks. No financial terms disclosed.
news.summary: Today in Chicago, Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) revealed its acquisition of Sweetwood Smoke & Co., known for their popular FATTY Smoked Meat Sticks. The financial details of the acquisition were kept confidential. FATTY Smoked Meat Sticks are nutritious snacks high in protein, catering to health-conscious individuals.

news.headline: Lender Toolkit prepares for 4th Supercar Experience at ICE Experience 2025 in Las Vegas, exciting mortgage industry leaders.
news.summary: In Snoqualmie, Washington on August 9, 2024, Lender Toolkit is excited to announce the upcoming Supercar Experience as part of ICE Experience 2025 in Las Vegas. This event marks the fourth consecutive year of the highly anticipated event for mortgage industry leaders.

news.headline: ONE Musicfest, backed by Procter and Gamble, marks 15th anniversary with star-studded lineup for 2024 festival, including Cardi B, Jill Scott, and Earth, Wind & Fire.
news.summary: The 2024 music festival lineup is set to feature a star-studded array of chart-topping and platinum-selling artists such as Cardi B, Gunna, Jill Scott, Victoria Monét, Earth, Wind & Fire, Glorilla, Nelly, Fantasia, Method Man, Young Nudy, Sexyy Red, and Ari. This lineup, produced by ONE Musicfest in collaboration with Live Nation Urban, promises to deliver an unforgettable experience for fans. With a mix of established and up-and-coming talent, this festival will showcase a diverse range of musical genres. Get ready to groove to the tunes of these top artists at the upcoming festival.

news.headline: Future FinTech Group Inc. appoints Hu Li as new CEO. Board of Directors approved the decision on Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, Future Fintech Group Inc. (NASDAQ: FTFT) disclosed that their Board of Directors approved a new initiative. Future Fintech, a prominent financial and digital technology service provider, made this announcement. The specifics of the initiative were not detailed in the news piece.

news.headline: Life Time files patent for new ultimate pickleball, promising better play, consistency, and durability. Founded in Chanhassen, Minn.
news.summary: The Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Life Time is leading the development of a new sports ball aimed at improving play quality, stability, and longevity. The company, based in CHANHASSEN, Minnesota, revealed on August 9, 2024, its submission of a patent application for The innovative product. Life Time is a key player in the rapidly expanding American sports market, with a strong focus on enhancing the player experience.

news.headline: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau's proposed rule would classify online paycheck advances as loans, mandating providers to divulge charges.
news.summary: A new rule proposed by the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau aims to classify certain offerings as loans, obligating providers to disclose their fees as interest rates. This regulation is targeted at increasing transparency in financial services and ensuring consumers are fully informed about the costs involved. If implemented, the rule could impact a significant number of providers and borrowers, potentially changing the way financial products are marketed and understood by the public. This initiative underscores the importance of clear and accurate information in the consumer finance industry.

news.headline: Amber Grid reports operating results for the first half of 2024, showing significant growth in key figures.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.2%, marking an increase of 1.3% from the previous quarter. This translates to approximately 1.5 million people out of work. The data also indicated a decrease in job vacancies by 12% compared to last year. The hardest-hit sectors were found to be hospitality and retail, with a significant drop in hiring activities. Experts are predicting a slow recovery for the job market in the coming months as the economy continues to grapple with the effects of the pandemic.

news.headline: Webuy gets $2M debt financing convertible at a premium, with potential for additional $4M; intending to accelerate growth.
news.summary: The funds raised will be used to enhance our growth strategy and propel expansion.

news.headline: Scilex partners with Devart ME and CH Trading for ZTlido® distribution in Morocco, Tunisia, Libya, Jordan, Iraq and South Africa.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California on August 9, 2024, Scilex Holding Company (Nasdaq: SCLX) revealed a significant development. The company specializing in non-opioid pain management products for both acute and chronic pain has entered a Master Distributor Agreement. This agreement involves Devart Middle East Food Supplements as the Master Distributor and CH Trading Group LLC as the Territories Distributor. The primary objective of this agreement is to broaden the distribution of ZTlido® into specific countries. These designated territories include Morocco, Tunisia, Libya, Jordan, Iraq, and South Africa. This strategic move aims to further expand the market reach of ZTlido® in these regions.

news.headline: 2025 Malibu Wakesetter 25 LSV boasts overhaul with improved wake & wave performance.
news.summary: The Malibu Wakesetter 25 LSV has been completely overhauled for 2025, with a redesigned hull to improve wake and wave performance while towing.

news.headline: Cemtrex to host fiscal Q3 2024 financial results conference call on August 14, 2024 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: Cemtrex Inc., a company specializing in advanced security technology and industrial services, is set to conduct a conference call on August 14, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time. The call will focus on the company's performance in the fiscal third quarter concluding on June 30, 2024. The results will be shared in a press release before the call. Cemtrex Inc. trades on the NASDAQ under the symbols CETX and CETXP.

news.headline: United-Guardian (NASDAQ:UG) reports second-quarter sales up from $2.65M in 2023 to $3.39M in 2024, net income rises to $956,225.
news.summary: United-Guardian, Inc. (NASDAQ:UG) released its financial results for the second quarter and first half of 2024. Sales for the first half of the year, ending on June 30th, rose from $5,220,623 in 2023 to $6,645,149 in 2024. The net income also saw an increase, going from $1,217,175 ($0.26 per share) to $1,881,667 ($0.41 per share) for the same period. In the second quarter, sales went up from $2,650,299 in 2023 to $3,390,205 in 2024. Correspondingly, the net income surged from $461,094 ($0.10 per share) to $956,225 ($0.21 per share) for the second quarter.

news.headline: LIS Solutions wins OASIS+ contract for intelligence services for government partners in Chantilly, Virginia on Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: LIS Solutions, Inc., a prominent provider of advanced language services, intelligence analysis, cyber analytical support, and industrial security, based in Chantilly, Virginia, has recently secured a new contract. The contract was awarded as part of the One Acquisition Solution for Integrated Services (OASIS) program. This achievement highlights the company's expertise in various specialized fields. The news was announced on August 9, 2024.

news.headline: Harfang Exploration Inc to acquire NewOrigin Gold Corp in definitive agreement to consolidate assets; NewOrigin shareholders to own 20% of Harfang Shares.
news.summary: In Montreal and Toronto, on August 9, 2024, Harfang Exploration Inc. (TSX.V: HAR) and NewOrigin Gold Corp. (TSX.V: NEWO) have officially entered into a definitive arrangement agreement on August 8, 2024. According to the Agreement, Harfang is set to acquire all the outstanding common shares of NewOrigin, subject to specific conditions. Post-transaction, it is anticipated that NewOrigin shareholders will possess around 20% of Harfang's common shares.

news.headline: Five9 stock drops premarket after reporting Q2 revenue of $252.1 million, adjusted gross margin at 60.5%, EBITDA at $41.8 million, and EPS of $0.52 above consensus.
news.summary: Five9, Inc. (NASDAQ:FIVN) saw a decline in shares following the release of their second-quarter 2024 earnings report. The company reported a revenue of $252.1 million, surpassing the expected $245.2 million. Adjusted gross margin dropped to 60.5% from 61.8% compared to the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA increased to $41.8 million from $41.5 million year-over-year. Operating cash flow for the quarter was $19.9 million. Adjusted EPS of $0.52 exceeded the anticipated $0.44. Chairman and CEO Mike Burkland expressed satisfaction with the strong second-quarter results, marking a significant achievement for the company.

news.headline: META child purchase for $1,000-$15,000 reported in political trade involving Ro Khanna on 07/02/2024; filed on 08/07/2024.
ALGN stock advised for purchase by Ro Khanna for child between $1,000 to $15,000 on July 2, 2024; filed on August 7, 2024.
